ogTitle: Glanville vs Glen Osmond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glanville and Glen Osmond.
heading: Glanville vs Glen Osmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glanville, South Australia and Glen Osmond, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glanville has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Glen Osmond (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glanville or Glen Osmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glanville has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Glen Osmond scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glanville scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Osmond scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glanville or Glen Osmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glanville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
